General.Name: MS Industrie AG
General.Description: MS Industrie AG primarily operates in the powertrain and ultrasonic technology businesses in Germany and internationally. It designs, develops, and manufactures automotive components and systems for engines. The company also offers services in the field of ultrasonic technologies for the automotive, textile, medical technology, consumer goods, and other industries, such as customer-specific and turnkey special ultrasonic machines; servo presses for welding, sealing, cutting, separating welding, and punching; and systems and components comprising generators and converters, amplitude transformers and sonotrodes, feed units, and manual ultrasonic welding units. In addition, it provides corporate finance, controlling and reporting, risk management, corporate governance, and transaction advisory services. Further, the company produces electric motors and associated components, centrifugal fans and blowers, and e-mobility drives for refrigeration logistics, textile machinery, pumps, lifting equipment, and various special mechanical engineering applications. Additionally, it operates a solar power plant. The company was formerly known as GCI Industrie AG and changed its name to MS Industrie AG in July 2012. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Munich, Germany.
